claim_boundary: TICKET116 proves an exact finite Mobius-sign lift and polarization identity and rejects an independent-sign triangle contract on six finite rows. It does not prove a uniform signed Vaughan estimate, any of the four conjectures, or a conjecture counterexample.

exact_mobius_sign_lift.type_ii_identity: For the actual Vaughan cutoffs, II(n)=II_plus(n)-II_minus(n), where II_plus and II_minus separately sum the outer divisors with mu(d)=+1 and mu(d)=-1.
exact_mobius_sign_lift.endpoint_identity: Linearity of the DFT, minor-cell prefix sum, and Farey endpoint map gives P_{q,a}=P^+_{q,a}-P^-_{q,a} exactly.
exact_mobius_sign_lift.mean_identity: M_q=M_q^+-M_q^- and Re(M_q H_q)=Re(M_q^+ H_q)-Re(M_q^- H_q).
exact_mobius_sign_lift.centered_identity: Z_q=Z_q^+-Z_q^- after the full complex constant mode is removed in every sign layer.

polarization_theorem.meaning: The effect of the Mobius-sign interaction is represented exactly by the cross term before any norm is applied. Positive covariance reduces the signed norm and negative covariance enlarges it; either effect disappears from an independent triangle bound.
polarization_theorem.scope: This is an exact finite-dimensional identity for the actual finite Vaughan layers, not a uniform lower bound for the covariance.

independent_sign_triangle_no_go.tested_contract: Pay |Re(M_q^+H_q)|+|Re(M_q^-H_q)| and (||Z_q^+||_2+||Z_q^-||_2)||rho_q-mean rho_q||_2 independently for every q.
independent_sign_triangle_no_go.deterministic_order: The independent-sign budget is always at least the signed TICKET115 budget by the scalar and vector triangle inequalities.
independent_sign_triangle_no_go.finite_result: The independent-sign contract worsens the numerator budget on all six audited scales and does not close any audited finite scale.
independent_sign_triangle_no_go.logical_result: Expanding into Mobius sign layers and then taking separate absolute values cannot prove the retained TICKET115 budget. A proof must preserve signed Mobius interaction or prove a positive cross-layer covariance estimate.

finite_frontier.interpretation: The row uses measured finite transforms and supplies no asymptotic covariance theorem.

retained_asymptotic_criterion.statement: Derive the scalar mean and centered endpoint estimate from the signed outer-Mobius Vaughan sum before applying norms, or prove a denominator-summed lower bound for Re<Z_q^+,Z_q^-> strong enough to keep the combined budget below the independently established positive comparison scale.
retained_asymptotic_criterion.positive_scale_obligation: The major-plus-Type-I-minor comparison term must be proved positive on the same all-sufficiently-large-X range.
retained_asymptotic_criterion.counterexample_route: Construct actual Vaughan sign layers for an unbounded scale sequence whose scalar cancellation and centered covariance fail every fixed subcritical margin.

discarded_routes: Bound the mu-positive and mu-negative Type-II layers independently after the Farey transform.
Use only ||Z_q^+|| and ||Z_q^-|| while discarding their polarization term.
Infer a uniform positive covariance theorem from the six measured rows.
Treat an abstract favorable pair of sign layers as Vaughan-realizable without the divisor-convolution identity.
Transfer averaged shifted-Mobius results directly to the fixed shift-two binary correlation.

literature_boundary.established_background: Vaughan Type-II identities, bilinear large-sieve estimates, and averaged Mobius cancellation on shifted primes are established.
literature_boundary.project_specific_result: The exact mu-sign lift through this half-Farey endpoint map, its polarization ledger, and the six-scale independent-sign no-go audit are project-specific.
literature_boundary.non_transfer: The cited results do not provide the fixed-shift, denominator-summed signed covariance or endpoint budget required here.

twin_mobius_sign_cyclotomic_audit.proof_boundary: TICKET116 proves an exact finite Mobius-sign lift and polarization identity and rejects an independent-sign triangle contract on six finite rows. It does not prove a uniform signed Vaughan estimate, any of the four conjectures, or a conjecture counterexample.

attempts.proof_or_counterexample_mode: exact Mobius-sign lift, polarization identity, and independent-sign no-go
attempts.attempt: Lift every half-Farey endpoint coefficient into the actual mu-positive and mu-negative Vaughan layers, retain their scalar difference and centered cross covariance, and test independent sign-layer bounds.
attempts.obstruction: Mean cancellation and the centered cross covariance are measured finite quantities, and the covariance changes sign across the audit; no uniform Vaughan estimate controls their combined effect yet.
attempts.next_experiment: Expand the signed endpoint functional by dyadic outer-divisor blocks and prove a denominator-summed bilinear dispersion bound, or construct an unbounded Vaughan-realizable margin failure.
attempts.claim_boundary: No Twin Prime proof and no certified last-twin counterexample.
